entry.title: Quicken Quicken >>> Can I talk to a real person at Quicken?
entry.content: https://www.shetlink.com/index.php?/forums/topic/27252-can-i-talk-to-a-real-person-at-quicken/

entry.title: Re: Encoding Conversion Groovy Script
entry.content: It worked! Thank you so much!!

entry.title: Re: Unable to terminate DIA process and user sessions.
entry.content: Contact SAP support. Restart the system if that's urgent.

entry.title: 24x7!! How do I speak to a human at Quicken? [Help~DesK]
entry.content:
How do I speak to a human at Quicken?

To speak to a human at Quicken, call 1-(888)-569-0146 . Use the phone menu to select the appropriate options and wait to be connected to a live support agent.

To contact Quicken customer support, call 1-(888)-569-0146 . Their customer service team can assist with iquiries and troubleshooting related to your Quicken software. 

To reach Intuit Quicken Support call (1-(888)-569-0146. Their team can assist with questions or technical issues related to Quicken software.

The Quicken support number is 1-(888)-569-0146. Call this number for assistance with Quicken .
How do I contact Quicken Desktop support?

To contact Quicken Desktop support, call 1-(888)-569-0146 . Follow the prompts to navigate to the Desktop support team and speak with a representative knowledgeable in Quicken Desktop solutions.

How do I contact Quicken desktop support?

To contact Quicken Desktop support, dial 1-(888)-569-0146 . Use the phone menu to select the Quicken Desktop option, and you will be connected to a support representative who can assist you.

How do I contact Quicken support team?

You can contact the Quicken support team by calling 1-(888)-569-0146 . Follow the prompts to get directed to the appropriate department based on your support needs.

How can I talk to a live person in Quicken?

To talk to a live person in Quicken, call 1-(888)-569-0146 . Follow the automated prompts to reach the correct department and wait to be connected to a live representative.

How do I speak to a live person at Quicken?

To speak to a live person at Quicken, dial 1-(888)-569-0146 . Navigate the phone menu to the relevant support area and stay on the line to be connected with a live agent.

Can I talk to a real person at Quicken?

Yes, you can talk to a real person at Quicken by calling 1-(888)-569-0146 . Follow the phone prompts to reach the support area you need and speak with a live representative.

How do I speak to a human at Quicken?

To speak to a human at Quicken, call 1-(888)-569-0146 . Use the phone menu to select the appropriate options and wait to be connected to a live support agent.

entry.title: VELO CREDIT LOAN APP CUSTOMER CARE HELPLINE NUMBER+91)// 9749213045.../ ·7439367021 All.VELO CREDIT

J h

entry.title: Re: The next step of ABAPs evolution: ABAP Cloud now part of SAP Build
entry.content:
Hi Community,

"

With SAP Build, you can accelerate your ERP modernization, foster innovation and automate processes, all within a single comprehensive suite of extension development tools that includes low-code, pro-code and generative AI capabilities.

SAP Build provides you the flexibility to create and extend applications, automate processes and design digital workspaces with low-code, pro-code and generative AI tools. Its collaborative design allows diverse teams to build solutions faster using pre-built solutions, AI assistance, and seamless integration with SAP applications.​

"

Thanks for sharing the message. 

Ready to go.

🙂

 

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: volaris Teléfono 24x7//¿Cómo llamar a Volaris Airlines en México?
entry.content:
Para hablar con una persona en Ｖｏｌａｒｉｓ Ａｉｒｌｉｎｅｓ, marca el número de atención al cliente ＋１－８８８－８２９－１４９２ （ＥＥ．ＵＵ．） （ＭＸ） ｏ ＋１－８８８－８２９－１４９５ （ＵＳ）

Sí, avianca ofrece la opción de chatear con su servicio de atención al cliente. A través de su sitio web, puedes acceder a la función de chat en vivo para resolver dudas rápidas. Sin embargo, si prefieres hablar directamente con un representante, puedes marcar el ＋１－８８８－８２９－１４９２ （ＥＥ．ＵＵ．） （ＭＸ） ｏ ＋１－８８８－８２９－１４９５ （ＵＳ） para una atención más personalizada.

entry.title: How Can I contact QuickBooks® Intuit Payroll Support by Phone
Re: How to send pdf file in binary format to ECM
entry.content:
Hi,

You may try using "InputStream" to read the content of the file using groovy script. Content from below code can be used in your POST call to ECM.

For ex:

def body = message.getBody(InputStream);

def content = body.getBytes();

Regards,

Chaitaanya Hanumanthu.

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP Build – Q3 2024 Edition
entry.content:
Hi Community,

" Release management and project lifecycle management: It’s now possible to release and transport projects across different tenants using SAP Cloud Transport Management System. You can transport project versions between subaccounts while isolating development, testing, and productive deployment of SAP Build Apps applications to their own landscapes. "

Such a nice sharing.

🙂

 

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: F-32 clear customer: Error- Enter the Item number
entry.content: Hello, Unfortunately I couldn't reproduce this!

entry.title: Re: XSD Validation for DMEEX
entry.content:
Hi @thomas_janssen,

Thank you for your question.

XSD validation is only available in DMEEX transaction on SAP S/4HANA Cloud systems. In DMEE we do not provide this possibility.

Best regards,
Richard

entry.title: !!QUICKEN!! Can I Talk To A Real Person At Quicken?
entry.content:
!!QUICKEN!! Can I Talk To A Real Person At Quicken?

Yes, you can talk to a real person at Quicken by calling 1-(888)-569-0146 . Follow the phone prompts to reach the support area you need and speak with a live representative.

To contact Quicken customer support, call 1-(888)-569-0146 . Their customer service team can assist with inquiries and troubleshooting related to your Quicken software.
To reach Intuit Quicken Support call (1-(888)-569-0146. Their team can assist with questions or technical issues related to Quicken software.
The Quicken support number is 1-(888)-569-0146. Call this number for assistance with Quicken .
How do I contact Quicken Desktop support?

To contact Quicken Desktop support, call 1-(888)-569-0146 . Follow the prompts to navigate to the Desktop support team and speak with a representative knowledgeable in Quicken Desktop solutions.

How do I contact Quicken desktop support?

To contact Quicken Desktop support, dial 1-(888)-569-0146 . Use the phone menu to select the Quicken Desktop option, and you will be connected to a support representative who can assist you.

How do I contact Quicken support team?

You can contact the Quicken support team by calling 1-(888)-569-0146 . Follow the prompts to get directed to the appropriate department based on your support needs.

How can I talk to a live person in Quicken?

To talk to a live person in Quicken, call 1-(888)-569-0146 . Follow the automated prompts to reach the correct department and wait to be connected to a live representative.

How do I speak to a live person at Quicken?

To speak to a live person at Quicken, dial 1-(888)-569-0146 . Navigate the phone menu to the relevant support area and stay on the line to be connected with a live agent.

How do I speak to a human at Quicken?

To speak to a human at Quicken, call 1-(888)-569-0146 . Use the phone menu to select the appropriate options and wait to be connected to a live support agent.

Hello All,

I'm facing the below error while accessing the T-Code ML81N in SAP S4Hana(Onpremise)  2023 Version. Can any please reply to me how to fix this?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: फोन .पे. गलत. पेमेंट.
entry.content: किसी गलत लेनदेन के लिए फोन पे से धन वापसी के लिए, आपको तुरंत फोन पे के ग्राहक सहायता से संपर्क करना चाहिए: (+91)9030-362897//// .

entry.title: Re: Active contributors against spam attacks
entry.content:
Hello @Sandra_Rossi 

I've just noticed the influx of spammers myself. I do agree with your proposal. Active contributors will remove them faster than moderators only.

However, spammers are like cockroaches once you let them in, they are very hard to root out. I would suggest to implement a rule that first, say 5 posts of any newly registered user have to be manually approved by a moderator or active contributor. Five posts are enough to verify a new user's intentions. Spammers will not post five decent posts just to post their garbage afterwards.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Special Stock - store at OUR location but CUSTOMER assets
entry.content:
Dear Expert, 

Please let me know if there is a way to realize this with S/4HANA.

We store some goods in OUR location, but it is CUSTOMER asset.
It means the goods delivered to customers is temporarily stored in our location.

The goods ships from our company upon order from the customer.
It is similar to Special Stock W (Cunstomer consignment stock), but the difference is that it is already recorded as a customer asset.

For the goods of that customer asset, we do not need to manage the amount (amount is 0 yen) and only need to know the quantity.

Is it possible to achieve this by using the Special Stock indicator?

 

Best Regards, 

Haruki SATO

Yong

entry.title: Can I chat with someone on Venmo? {{Skip the Issue Line}}
entry.content: No, Venmo doesn't have a chat feature {{1-(866)-481-8205}}. You can send messages with your payments, but there's no separate messaging system for chatting. If you want to communicate with someone {{1-(866)-481-8205}}, you’ll need to use another app or platform

entry.title: Re: SAP LOGON OPTION TO CHNAGE LANGAUGUE SETTING
entry.content: Hello Abo,Thankyou for detailed answer as my question is in above settings in the screenshots where i am unable to se sap logon option itself to change the languague .Could you suggest how do we add English as a languague here ..?

entry.title: Centralized Storage for Error message - SAC Scripting
entry.content:
HI All.

We are creating an input form and performing a lot of script validation to display different error messages whenever incorrect values are entered. Currently, in the model/system/script, we don't see the validation error messages being stored centrally for reuse. This seems to be a bug, as the system should ideally allow for the central storage and management of these messages to ensure consistency across different scripts. 

For the various validations we have implemented, we are displaying a popup for errors with custom messages like 'E002 - Mandatory field.'

We have around 20 custom error messages, but users are requesting if these messages can be standardized in SAC or if there is an alternative way to store them centrally in SAC.

 

 

SAP Analytics Cloud @N1kh1l @Galin_Manolov  @JefB

entry.title: Re: Purchase Orders Approval Using SAP Fiori

Hi Jagdeep,

I have seen the screenshot you added above. How did you add a pricing condition in the app? Can you please help me?

entry.title: Application Decisions for Service Request Management
entry.content:
Summary

A key part of the customer experience domain is the Service Request Management (Customer Service > Customer Service and Support) that records the initial contact from customers, and it is the starting point for a vast number of follow up processes.

As target architecture for this business capability, we have SAP Cloud for Customer, SAP Service Cloud V2 and SAP S/4HANA Service. This document will give you some relevant decision criteria to decide how to support these business requirements.

Business Requirements

These are the related capabilities in the Reference Business Architecture:

  • Customer Service and Support: Ability to facilitate sales and service teams in interacting with and supporting customers using a variety of channels. Includes the ability to manage inquiries, service request, problems, and complaints. Also includes the ability to manage customer return.
  • Service Request Management: Ability to receive and process service requests originating from various sources such as a call center or e-mail. It includes service ticket management and case management.
  • Inquiry Management: Ability to receive, record, and process customer inquiries and issues. It includes triggering activities to provide a resolution to the inquiry, such as providing information on order status, creating, or changing a sales or service order, or recording a warranty claim.
  • Complaints Management: Ability to manage and process customer complaints received through different channels with complete visibility of the customer, service, and maintenance history. Also includes the ability to initiate and track follow-up actions to trigger complaint resolutions.
  • Customer Claims Management: Ability to process claims from customers for the recovery of costs based on contractual agreements. It includes the ability to receive and record the claim and to decide if a credit memo will be issued or the claim will be disputed.
  • Omnichannel Customer Engagement: Ability to facilitate sales and service teams in interacting with and supporting customers using a variety of channels, such as Web, phone, e-mail, and social media. It includes the ability to provide agents with cross-channel visibility to customer interactions and service history.

Solution Options

Now, three options will cover the giving capabilities:

  • SAP Cloud for Customer - Service Cloud: Ticket Management
  • SAP Service Cloud Version 2: Case Management
  • SAP S/4HANA Service: Service Request Management

Characterization of the Solution Options

SAP Cloud for Customer - Service Cloud

SAP Sales & Service Cloud, a.k.a. as SAP Cloud for Customer (C4C), is SAP's on-demand cloud-based Customer Relationship Management, it consists of SAP Cloud for Sales and SAP Cloud for Services.

Ticket Management

Tickets are a record in the system of a request for some type of service or support from an account, customer, or employee. This record allows you to track interactions with the service requestor, as well as details like how much time has passed since the ticket was created, what actions were taken to resolve the issue, priority, associated products, or warranties, and much more. Tickets are also sometimes referred to as service requests. More information in the SAP help portal.

SAP Service Cloud Version 2

SAP Service Cloud Version 2 is considered the next evolution of SAP C4C - Service. SAP Service Cloud Version 2 enables your service organization to run service processes efficiently through a new case management framework with a flow builder and runtime engine.

The solution automates email communication through automatic email creation, categorization, prioritization, and routing to the right agent. Support your customers with an omni-channel experience on a modern agent desktop. Each synchronous or asynchronous communication item appears in a dedicated area in the agent desktop. This area provides the main functions that the agent needs to interact with customers.

Case Management

Cases are a record of a request for some type of service or support from an account, customer, or employee. This record allows you to track interactions with the service requester. Cases also record details like how much time has passed since the case was created, what actions were taken to resolve the issue, priority, associated products, or warranties, and much more. Cases are sometimes referred to as service requests. Additional information in the SAP help portal.

Note: In SAP CRM, the concept of Case it’s different: It refers to a central collection point used to consolidate, manage, and process information which is different from the actual Service Request.

SAP S/4HANA Service

SAP S/4HANA Service is a component of the SAP S/4HANA suite. S/4HANA Service supports the setup and operation of functions and processes for service contract management, service order management, service request management, service billing, and customer engagement. The service solution also supports subscription order management and is used with various industry solutions.

Service Request Management

You use service request management to monitor and fulfill requests for service by your customers. Service requests can be used internally by companies where a department delivers services as well as in external customer-facing scenarios. They enable you to measure and evaluate the quality of services provided. For more information please visit SAP help portal.

Criteria to determine the most suitable target solution

Several aspects will determinate the best solution to handle the Service Requests in your target architecture, here’s some of the most relevant ones:

1.- Deployment options

SAP Cloud for Customer - Service Cloud
SAP Service Cloud Version 2

Both solutions are SaaS, meaning they’re only available to be deployed in the cloud.

S/4HANA Service

There are two main S/4HANA deployment options: Cloud and On-Premise. In the cloud area we have public cloud (offered as GROW) and private cloud (offered as RISE).

2.- Integration with S/4HANA

SAP Cloud for Customer - Service Cloud

Cloud for Customer integration with the S/4HANA requires an integration platform to synchronize master data like Accounts and Registered Product and execute processes like Work Tickets. Two options are available:

  • SAP Cloud Integration (SAP Integration Suite): It offers out-of-the-box prepackaged integration content (iFlows) for C4C and S/4HANA integration. These iFlows can be customized to match your requirements. For technical details please refer to the setting up guide
  • SAP Process Integration: iFlows package needs to be downloaded and configured in SAP PI. For technical details please refer to the setting up guide

A OData Services API is also available to integrate with external systems.

SAP Service Cloud Version 2

SAP Service Cloud Version 2 integrates with the S/4HANA system via SAP Cloud Integration and SAP Event Mesh (SAP Business Technology Platform). Please refer to the setting up guide for more technical details.

A set of REST APIs are also available for integrations.

Note: The number of APIs is limited in comparison with SAP C4C.

S/4HANA Service

Since S/4HANA Service resides in S/4HANA there’s no need for an integration platform or middleware to integrate.

3.- Extensibility

SAP Cloud for Customer - Service Cloud

SAP C4C comes with several ways to adapt the solution including non-technical or key users’ options like:

  • Adaptation and Personalization
  • Extension Fields / Custom business objects
  • Mashups
  • Workflows

For more complex adaptations you can use the SAP Cloud Applications Studio which is a PaaS-based software development kit (SDK) often used by developers that enables you to adapt and enhance the capacities of the SAP C4C.

For more information please refer to the SAP Cloud for Customer Extension Guide.

SAP Service Cloud Version 2

Like SAP C4C, SAP Service Cloud Version 2 comes with various ways to adapt the solution including non-technical or key users’ options like:

  • Adaptation
  • Extension Fields
  • Custom buttons
  • Mashups

For actual enhancements, SAP Service Cloud Version 2 prefer extensibility method is side-by-side extensions and the recommendation is to build them on the SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP). SAP BTP enables developers to implement loosely coupled extension applications securely, thus implementing additional workflows or modules on top of the existing SAP Service Cloud Version 2.

For this, you can use the External hooks that provide a way for external components to interact with the main system at specific events or actions, allowing for customization and flexibility in the overall functionality.

For additional technical details please refer to the Extensibility section of the Set Up Guide.

S/4HANA Service

S/4HANA Service has a consistent & fresh SAP Fiori 3 UI based on SAP CRM WebClient UI technology which is the backbone of the SAP CRM. This means that you can leverage and reuse your existing ABAP enhancements built in SAP CRM in S/4HANA Service (considering some minor adjustments).

For additional technical details please refer to the WebClient UI Framework documentation.

Additionally, S/4HANA Service offers the possibility to personalize the user interface, pages, tables, and search results.

4.- New releases and innovation

SAP Cloud for Customer - Service Cloud

SAP releases quarterly updates of C4C delivering innovations to users through a combination of new functionalities and improvements, cloud-based architecture, and integration with other SAP solutions. These new releases can’t be evaded, and the date and time are well known. Please check the help portal for detail information.

Note: C4C has scheduled maintenance windows (with a downtime of max. 4 hours) weekly and major upgrade windows (with a downtime of max. 12 hours) quarterly. More information in the link above.

SAP Service Cloud Version 2

Like C4C, SAP Service Cloud V2 releases quarterly updates. Since SAP Service Cloud Version 2 is built on a microservices-based cloud architecture, it allows for continuous updates and faster delivery of new features without disruptions.

S/4HANA Service

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition has new releases every quarter while SAP S/4HANA private edition has a 2-year release cycle with Feature Pack Stacks every six months.

5.- Machine Learning and Generative AI

SAP Cloud for Customer - Service Cloud

Machine Learning in SAP C4C: In Service Cloud you can use machine learning for the following scenarios:

  • Ticket Categorization and Priority Prediction: Use machine learning to automate the ticket categorization and prioritization processes.
  • Similar Ticket Recommendation: Find similar past tickets you can check for solutions that can apply to the current ticket.
  • Ticket NLP Classification: Natural language processing (NLP) can identify ticket language, sentiment, and can extract product and customer identification.
  • Ticket Time to Completion: View a prediction for the time to complete the current ticket, based on closed ticket completion times.
  • E-Mail Template Recommendation: The machine learning model recommends the most suitable response templates for a ticket.
  • Machine Translation: Translate ticket text with a pretrained machine learning model.
  • Text Summarization: Use Natural Language Processing (NLP) to summarize text in the ticket subject field and ticket interactions.

SAP Service Cloud Version 2

Intelligent Services in SAP Service Cloud V2: Use case data to create and train machine learning models to recognize similar cases, predict case categories, and sentiment.

  • Case Categorization: Use machine learning to automate the case categorization process.
  • Similar Case Recommendation: Find solutions from similar cases from the past that you can apply to the current case.
  • NLP Classification: Use Natural language processing (NLP) to identify sentiment from email.
  • Machine Translation: Use machine translation to translate emails.
  • Case Summarization: Use Natural Language Processing (NLP) to summarize the text in the subject field and email interactions.
  • Case Topic Analyzer: Use the Case Topic Analyzer machine learning model to view trending topics from cases.
  • Case Type Determination: The Case Type Determination machine learning model determines the case type during the conversion of email to case.
  • Profanity Check: Use profanity check to define a set of pejorative vocabulary.

Generative AI: Use Generative AI to generate account synopsis, case summary, and draft email response for cases.

  • Case Summary: Use Generative AI to summarize text in email interactions for cases.
  • Email Draft Recommender: Use email draft recommender from Generative AI to draft email replies or interactions for cases (currently tested in English, German, Spanish, and French).

S/4HANA Service

You can connect SAP Service Ticket Intelligence (see note below) to use machine learning to automatically categorize service requests with the Text Classification feature. More information about Service Ticket Intelligence in the help.

Note: SAP Service Ticket Intelligence is scheduled to be removed from the list of Eligible Cloud Services as of 2023-10-15. The service will be available until the end of the current subscription term. It will not be available for renewal terms that begin after the removal date.

6.- Mobile App

SAP Cloud for Customer - Service Cloud

SAP Cloud for Customer provides you with instant access to the solution data from a phone or tablet using the SAP Cloud for Customer Mobile Apps available for iPad, Android, and Windows Tablet.

Mobile edition leverages responsive UI technology to provide the same experience across different devices and platforms. You enjoy the same feature function level across platforms and devices, including access to device capabilities with minimal configuration and mobile-only effort. Offline capability is also available to add, modify, or delete items that are saved locally and synchronized, when you connect to the network.

More information in the About Mobile Options section of the SAP help portal.

SAP Service Cloud Version 2

At the moment, no Case Management functionality is available in the Mobile App but the application can be accessed via an internet browser.

S/4HANA Service

Not offered.

7.- Analytics

SAP Cloud for Customer - Service Cloud

Using the extensive and flexible business analytics features, you can easily create custom reports using the guided procedures. You can define your own Reports, Data Sources, and Views. The Analytics data in the solution is real time. More information in the Overview of Analytics section of the help.

SAP Service Cloud Version 2

The system is available with a prepackaged integration with SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), offering an embedded SAC to all users. With this prepackaged embedded SAC, you can use all features of embedded SAC in the system.

The following are the SAP Analytics Cloud, Embedded Edition features available in the system:

  • Query Designer
  • Linked Analysis

For more information, please visit this link.

S/4HANA Service

SAP S/4HANA contains analytical applications that enables you to monitor and analyze your data. One of the ways of implementing embedded analytics is the use of multidimensional reports. You can also use the Query Browser or the View Browser.

S/4HANA Embedded Analytics: With the seamless integration of analytics features in S/4HANA, you can benefit from a variety of analysis options in an environment with simplified data model, new user experience, advanced processing, and deployment options suitable to your business needs.

8.- Critical functionalities not available in all options

Even though most of the Service Request Management functionalities are available in all three options (actual name and approach may defer), some of them are not. In the following table you’ll find those that are not available:

 SAP C4C Service CloudSAP Service Cloud V2S/4HANA Service
In-house repair  X
Customer Returns  X
ATP (ERP int.)X X
SAP FSM integrationX X

Comparison Table

Finally, here’s a short overview of the decision criteria we presented in this document.

 SAP C4C Service CloudSAP Service Cloud V2S/4HANA Service
Deployment optionsCloudCloudOn-Prem
Cloud (Public or Private)
Integration with S/4HANACloud Integration
Process Integration		Cloud Integration-
ExtensibilitySAP Cloud Applications Studio (SDK)Side-by-side extensions (SAP BTP)Fully extendable using SAP CRM WebClient UI
New releases and innovationQuarterlyQuarterly.
Based on microservices.		Public Cloud: Quarterly
Private Cloud:
Feature Pack Stacks every six months
Machine Learning and Generative AIMLML + Gen AIML via SAP Service Ticket Intelligence (see note above)
Mobile AppMobile App availableNot available yet.Not offered.
AnalyticsReportsSAP Analytics Cloud, Embedded EditionS/4HANA Embedded Analytics

Conclusion

Your organization can select a solution from the Customer Experience (CX) portfolio such as C4C or Service Cloud V2, or S/4HANA Service to replace your current SAP CRM Service Request Management.

The key decision criteria outlined above focus on five criteria commonly observed with our customers:

  • Deployment
  • Integration with the Backoffice: Both cloud solutions require an integration tool, whereas S/4HANA Service operates within the same system.
  • Extensibility: Depending on the scope and complexity of your enhancements, you may choose to rebuild them in SAP C4C, adopt a side-by-side approach in SAP Service Cloud V2, or maintain them within S/4HANA Service.
  • New functionality releases: While all three options receive regular updates, most of the innovations are introduced in the CX portfolio.
  • ML and AI: Currently, SAP Service Cloud V2 is the only solution offering embedded Generative AI.
  • Mobile App: SAP C4C is the only mobile app that supports Service Request functionality.
  • Analytics: SAP Service Cloud V2 includes embedded SAC (SAP Analytics Cloud).

entry.title: Integrating Amazon Connect with SAP Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
• SAP Managed Tags:
    • SAP Sales Cloud,
    • SAP Service Cloud,
    • C4C Extensibility,
    • C4C Sales,
    • C4C Service,
    • SAP Sales Cloud Version 2,
  • SAP Service Cloud Version 2

As businesses strive to deliver seamless customer experiences, integrating contact center solutions like Amazon Connect with SAP Service Cloud V2 can offer significant benefits. By leveraging this integration, organizations can optimize customer service workflows, improve agent productivity, and deliver personalized customer interactions in real-time.

In this blog, we’ll walk you through the integration process, key benefits, and technical steps to get started.

What is Amazon Connect?

Amazon Connect is a cloud-based contact center service that enables businesses to set up and manage customer support at scale. It provides powerful telephony, omnichannel contact management, and robust analytics tools.

What is SAP Service Cloud V2?

SAP Service Cloud V2 is a customer service management solution designed to help businesses manage their service operations effectively. It provides features like case management, omnichannel support, and knowledge management, making it a go-to choice for many enterprises.

Benefits of Amazon Connect Integration with SAP Service Cloud V2

  • Seamless Customer Service: Provide a unified agent desktop with all customer data and interaction history.
  • Real-time Customer Insights: Agents can access relevant customer details during live calls, improving response times and personalization.
  • Improved Agent Efficiency: Reduce time spent switching between systems, allowing agents to handle more queries effectively.
  • Enhanced Reporting and Analytics: Gain insights into both telephony and case management metrics.

Integration Overview

The integration involves connecting Amazon Connect with SAP Service Cloud V2 through a combination of APIs, connectors, and middleware like SAP Integration Suite. This setup enables telephony data and customer interactions to flow seamlessly between the two platforms

Use Case: Real-time Customer Identification and Case Management

Let’s say a customer calls your support line using their registered phone number / with different number. With the Amazon Connect-SAP Service Cloud integration:

  • Caller Identification: Amazon Connect identifies the caller, retrieves their profile from SAP Service Cloud, and displays it to the agent.
  • Automated Case Creation: If it’s a new issue, SAP Service Cloud automatically creates a case, logging the customer interaction and call data with enhancement. or Agent can check the existing case for further processing the case 
  • Post-call Actions: After the call, agents can follow up using SAP Service Cloud's workflow capabilities to escalate cases, trigger surveys, or assign tasks.

Step-by-Step Integration Process

Step 1: Prepare Your Amazon Connect Instance

  1. Amazon Connect Setup: Start by configuring your Amazon Connect instance. You will need to set up:

    Get the Amazon Connect Instance ARN: This is crucial for authenticating and connecting with external services like SAP Service Cloud V2.Please reach to product team enable the feature flag
Step 2: SAP Service Cloud V2 Configuration
  1. Enable CTI in SAP Service Cloud V2:
    • Logon with Admin user and navigate to Settings -> CTIand enable CTI integration.
    • Create and configure a communication system for Amazon Connect.

entry.title: Re: Unable Terminate an employee
entry.content:
Hi @NareshKandukuri 

Please check the pay component setting. They would require end date to be specified.

Thanks

Manish

entry.title: Get Fast Respose )) Can I talk to a real person at Quicken?
entry.content:
To contact Quicken Desktop support, call 1-(888)-481-3585 . Follow the prompts to navigate to the Desktop support team and speak with a representative knowledgeable in Quicken Desktop solutions.

How do I contact Quicken desktop support?

To contact Quicken Desktop support, dial 1-(888)-481-3585 . Use the phone menu to select the Quicken Desktop option, and you will be connected to a support representative who can assist you.

How do I contact Quicken support team?

You can contact the Quicken support team by calling 1-(888)-481-3585 . Follow the prompts to get directed to the appropriate department based on your support needs.

How can I talk to a live person in Quicken?

To talk to a live person in Quicken, call 1-(888)-481-3585 . Follow the automated prompts to reach the correct department and wait to be connected to a live representative.

How do I speak to a live person at Quicken?

To speak to a live person at Quicken, dial 1-(888)-481-3585 . Navigate the phone menu to the relevant support area and stay on the line to be connected with a live agent.

Can I talk to a real person at Quicken?

Yes, you can talk to a real person at Quicken by calling 1-(888)-481-3585 . Follow the phone prompts to reach the support area you need and speak with a live representative.

How do I speak to a human at Quicken?

To speak to a human at Quicken, call 1-(888)-481-3585 . Use the phone menu to select the appropriate options and wait to be connected to a live support agent.

entry.title: SAP HANA Tools for Eclipse 2024-06 or 2024-09
entry.content:
Hello,

related to SAP Development Tools (ondemand.com) the latest release of SAP HANA Tools for Eclipse is for Eclipse Version 2024-03, which may lose support for ADT and BWMT soon. When will SAP HANA Tools be released for version 2024-09 or at least 2024-06?

Thanks

Philipp

entry.title: volaris Teléfono //¿Cómo llamar a Volaris Airlines en México?
entry.content:
Para hablar con una persona en Ｖｏｌａｒｉｓ Ａｉｒｌｉｎｅｓ, marca el número de atención al cliente ＋１－８８８－８２９－１４９２ （ＥＥ．ＵＵ．） （ＭＸ） ｏ ＋１－８８８－８２９－１４９５ （ＵＳ）

Sí, avianca ofrece la opción de chatear con su servicio de atención al cliente. A través de su sitio web, puedes acceder a la función de chat en vivo para resolver dudas rápidas. Sin embargo, si prefieres hablar directamente con un representante, puedes marcar el ＋１－８８８－８２９－１４９２ （ＥＥ．ＵＵ．） （ＭＸ） ｏ ＋１－８８８－８２９－１４９５ （ＵＳ） para una atención más personalizada.

entry.title: Re: Combination Order DIMP, error "No order selected"
entry.content:
SIMG - Production - Shop Floor Control - Master Data - Order - Administer selection profile for the combination

In configuration, the field selection profile determined the orders to be displayed in MILL_OC. So, define it accordingly. Don't mention any order types in it if you need all the orders to be displayed.

The main thing is production orders should be in unreleased state to get selected in the MILL_OC

entry.title: Re: Azure Databricks Database integration with Datasphere
entry.content: Please have a look here: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/unified-analytics-with-sap-datasphere-databricks-lakehouse-platform-data/ba-p/13555907

entry.title: [[Contact Experts]] Can I chat with someone on Venmo?
entry.content: No, Venmo doesn’t have a dedicated chat feature {{1-(866)-481-8205}}. You can add notes to transactions to communicate about payments, but for direct chatting, you’d need to use another messaging app.

entry.title: Re: The Extensibility Wizard: One Tool to Rule Them All?
entry.content: See Devtoberfest session about the extensibility wizard by @Sesh_Sreenivas and @Karthik-Thiru.

entry.title: Re: [[Contact Experts]] Can I chat with someone on Venmo?
entry.content: No, Venmo doesn’t have a dedicated chat feature. You can leave notes on transactions to explain or communicate about payments, but if you want to have a full conversation, you’ll need to use a different messaging app. C4Yourself

entry.title: Re: aATP ABC set-up not confirming orders
entry.content: Hi Shilpa, the last screenshot shows that ABC is not executed, which makes sense as you have removed material (or generally speaking: set it up to not find any alternative control access anymore). From the red bubble in the RACR one can see that ABC is executed but no material/plants have been checked. If there would have been a check of material/plant, then those insights would be visible in RACR (between red and gray bubble). You mentioned that you maintained Substn. Strgy with 'All possible plants'. This lead to a determination of all plants where the material is maintained (limited to the sames sales org. as the original requested plant). From that perspective you should at least get the material/plant that you find also in your second screenshot (4500070/1104). I am not sure on which S/4HANA release you are, but there is with 2023 FPS 2 the possibility to activate a logging to find more details. Otherwise, I recommend to open an incident to address it. Would be happy if you can share the solution 🙂

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: Excellent initiative, @David_Chaviano! This program offers a fantastic opportunity for newcomers to develop their skills, grow professionally, and excel in the SAP ecosystem. It provides a solid foundation for those looking to deepen their understanding and make a meaningful impact in the industry.

entry.title: Transport of Migration Project from one environment to another environment.
entry.content:
How to transfert/transport Migration Project from Dev to Quality System? 



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Transport of Migration Project from one environment t...
entry.content:
To transport the Migration Project from One system to another, you can use the Migration Object Modeler (transaction LTMOM) to add the relevant content to a transport request.

Refer to the Help document for more details.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

I am writing to express my interest in participating in the digital skills initiative by SAP Learning.

My name is Ruslan Fanian, and I am from Ukraine. I have a military background, and after my service, I transitioned to the IT sector. Over the past year, I have been working with SAP, leveraging my extensive IT background to adapt and grow within this field.

I believe I am a good fit for this program for several reasons. As a military veteran, I bring a unique perspective and disciplined approach to learning and problem-solving. Additionally, I am highly motivated to enhance my skills further and obtain an SAP certification, which will significantly contribute to my professional growth and open new opportunities within the SAP ecosystem.

The support provided by the digital skills initiative would be invaluable to me, especially considering the financial challenges and the competitive nature of the tech industry. This certification will not only unify my current knowledge but also enable me to contribute more effectively to my organization and community.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to participate in this initiative and am excited about the possibilities it will unlock for my career.

Best regards,
Ruslan

entry.title: Can I chat with someone on Venmo? ((Live chat and call ))
entry.content: Yes, you can! Venmo allows users to send messages along with their {{+1(866)-481-8205}} making it easy to communicate with the recipient. summary. Yes, there is a chat feature on Venmo {{+1(866)-481-8205}} that allows users to communicate with each other.

entry.title: Re: How to Handle "Allocation failed; Reason: booked memo...
entry.content: To address the memory performance issue, I applied several optimizations based on the points mentioned. These included adjusting system configurations and optimizing SQL queries, which helped improve efficiency and reduce memory load. Despite these improvements, the solution was still not fully adequate for the system's demands. After thorough analysis, I concluded that upgrading to a SAP instance with higher memory capacity was the most practical and effective option for ensuring stable performance under high loads.

entry.title: Re: What is the name of the table?What is the purpose of...
entry.content:
HI. 

 

Unfortunately, I have a limited exposure to transaction code or report names. However, as far as I understand, it is a dynamic list report with the list of changes implemented to certain objects.

Best regards. 

 

Tetiana

entry.title: How Can I Speak to a Lufthansa Airlines Representative Fast?
entry.content:
To speak to a Lufthansa Airlines representative quickly, call +1 (877) 671 0138. This will connect you directly to a live agent for immediate assistance. You can also use their website’s “Contact Us” page or mobile app to request a callback. Calling +1 (877) 671 0138 ensures that you speak with a representative right away for urgent inquiries.

How to Book Lufthansa Airlines Flight?

You can book a Lufthansa Airlines flight easily by calling +1 (877) 671 0138 to speak to a representative. The live agent will assist you with choosing flights, seat selection, and any special requests. Alternatively, you can book online via the Lufthansa website. For personalized help, call +1 (877) 671 0138 and let the representative guide you through the process.

entry.title: Re: How to Provision a SAP Datasphere Free-Tier Instance
entry.content:
Dear Community

We started in 2018 with SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Edition), we are using some BTP subscription in the Neo environment. In addition, we have 2 Cloud Foundry subaccounts (EU10 Frankfurt) with some subscriptions (eg. Event Mesh). 

While searching in the entitlements on the CF subaccounts, we cloud not find any SAP Datasphere entry!

Are there any settings or limitations we need to expand or activate?

Thanks for helping
Best Regards
Bruno

Is it right? Do you have any suggestions to accomplish this task?

entry.title: Can I chat with someone on Venmo? Complete~Guide~Here
entry.content: Venmo does not offer a built-in chat feature for general conversations, but users can Call +1(866)-481-8205 include messages when sending or requesting money. Call +1(866)-481-8205 Venmo for help. These notes are attached to the transaction and can be viewed by both parties.

entry.title: Storage bin determination for synchronous goods receipts
entry.content:
Hi there,
I am currently unsuccessfully trying to influence the process for synchronous goods receipts for purchase orders so that the goods receipt does not take place on the "GR-AREA" as automatically suggested, but on a different storage bin.

What is the logic here? Which settings / configurations does the storage bin determined in this process?

entry.title: Re: Urgent Issue : Transport API Management with TMS to d...
entry.content: @gos could u pls check if you have the space developer roles assigned for Cloud Foundry Org and Space?

entry.title: Re: Difference and impacts of using Master of Services instead of DIEN Material Type
entry.content: Hi Julio, the main difference between DIEN and SERV is that different views ("User department") are active per default, and that there are Service-specific fields in SERV for Sales - General/Plant regarding Service Profiles. Please review which fields and overall data you need for your processes and then decide on which material type to use.

entry.title: Re: SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery for SAP Integration Suite Artifacts

Or can some point me in the right direction to the newest documentation on SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery for SAP Integration Suite Artifacts

For Step 2, you specified that "RFC From GRC to SAP HR' which is not correct.

This RFC call happens from SAP HR to GRC. please correct it.

Thanks, Deepak.

entry.title: ABAP Memory Concept in S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I have requirement where I need to export internal table data from one BADI and import that data in 2nd BADI implementation. 
I tried below code, Its working if I write both code (Import & Export) in same BADI(which will make no sense), but not working for 2 different BADI. 

How to achieve this in Public cloud.?
Thank you in advance!!

entry.title: Condition contract settlement: Currency conversion local currency document currency
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

for the "old" SD bonus rebate agreements there was a function to change the currency, in which the accruals were reversed:

1272817 - Final settl.: Accruals reversal in rebate arrangement crcy

Is there something similar for the "new" condition contract / settlement management in S4 ?

Problem:

Accruals are build during invoice creation with accrual conditions assigned to each relevant invoice. In all situations, where we are using invoice currency not equals to local currency of our legal entity, the system converts the accruals by using convertion rate which is relevant to single document.

This leads to the situation that after final settlement, where the accrual clearance is handled with the conversion rate of the final settlement date, we still have leftovers in our accuals.

Any way how to solve this more elegant or to overcome this issue by reversing accruals always in local currency ? Instead of doing manual FI clearing posting at the end of the year ?

Thanks and best regards

Manuel

entry.title: Re: Centralized Storage for Error message - SAC Scripting
entry.content:
Maybe you can store those validation/error texts in a function part of a Composite object, for re-use across stories. Or perhaps in a dedicated model or public dimension for re-use.
But there's nothing natively for this in the SAC product.

entry.title: Re: Collective order - goods movement error
entry.content: Resolution Due to the collective order processing the system creates a material document for both the goods receipt of the lower-level order as well as for the goods issue of the higher-level. If the storage location is WM-managed a posting in the WM is absolutely necessary. It is necessary to ensure that both the Goods Receipt (GR) and the Goods Issue (GI) posting occur onto the same WM coordinates so that the quants cancel themselves out. Therefore, for such a scenario, it is not recommended to use dynamic coordinates because the storage bin would always correspond to the order number and the bin would always be different. As a consequence, it is recommended to enter the same fixed storage bin for both the GR and for the GI in the Customizing of the WM movement types: SPRO (IMG) > Logistics Execution > Warehouse Management > Activities > Transfers > Define Movement types

entry.title: Re: Collective order - goods movement error
entry.content: SAP Note 2760220 - Negative stock remaining after confirmation of collective order

entry.title: Re: goods movement error - collective order
entry.content:
2760220 - Negative stock remaining after confirmation of collective order

Resolution

Due to the collective order processing the system creates a material document for both the goods receipt of the lower-level order as well as for the goods issue of the higher-level. If the storage location is WM-managed a posting in the WM is absolutely necessary.

  1. It is necessary to ensure that both the Goods Receipt (GR) and the Goods Issue (GI) posting occur onto the same WM coordinates so that the quants cancel themselves out.
  2. Therefore, for such a scenario, it is not recommended to use dynamic coordinates because the storage bin would always correspond to the order number and the bin would always be different.
  3. As a consequence, it is recommended to enter the same fixed storage bin for both the GR and for the GI in the Customizing of the WM movement types: 
    SPRO (IMG) > Logistics Execution > Warehouse Management > Activities > Transfers > Define Movement types

entry.title: HSBC Bank of India the world and all the best
entry.content: Hfhc me know if you are free call me at the end of the world and all the best for

entry.title: Re: I've just downloaded logon , how can i access a syste...
entry.content:
Hello, You may not be able to logon to SAP client if you do not have server access. Downloading logon pad will help only if you have server access. It is granted either to SAP customers or to SAP Partners. I would recommend you search for one of such partner/vendor who provide server access. Such vendor have access to SAP servers and they create a user for you, which you can use to login into a client. 

Thank you!
